text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Noble, lovely, strong! 
Gorgeous, graceful, courageous!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That is precisely what I aspire to beвАФвАФA truly stalwart princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: DeeeryaaaaaaaгГЉгГЉгГЉгГЉгГЉ!!

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
UwaaahвА¶вА¶! Kawakami-san's run looks so strong every time I 
see itвА¶вА¶I can almost hear her heavy footsteps from hereпљЮвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Teammate B
text_block_list.text:
That powerful step is what makes her finishing leg so overwhelming. 
And so far, she has won 5 consecutive victories, including 2 G1sвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Teammate B
text_block_list.text:
Winning 3 consecutive victories from her debut, then going to 
the гАОOaksгАПвА¶вА¶You remember it too, don't you? The way she won that.

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it left quite an impressionвА¶вА¶! The physicality, 
and guts needed to make itвА¶вА¶Kawakami-san was just amazing.

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
Just like when she won the Double Tiara at the гАОShuka ShoгАП. Before 
the race, everyone thought it would be a showdown between three butвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Teammate B
text_block_list.text:
гАОIn the end it seemed one-sidedгАПвА¶вА¶there was an article like that. 
The pace was very fast so the race ended up becoming one long sprint.

text_block_list.name: Teammate B
text_block_list.text:
Focusing on that power, led to a fairly high level 
display of strength. That is Kawakami's weapon.

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the Tiara Rotation, her position 
as top of her generation is already secure. That's 
what it seems like, huhпљЮвА¶вА¶! Kawakami-san is amazingвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Haa, haa, phewгГЉгГЉгГЉвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶Mmm. 
One more!!

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
Wah! And she's so stoicпљЮвА¶вА¶! The next гАОQueen Elizabeth CupгАП 
is already Kawakami-san's isn't it!?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Yes! I'll be the one to do it! 
A spectacularпљЮ victory that will blow everyone away!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶now, this is the moment. As a Princess, I will do it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФThank you very much for speaking with us, Kawakami Princess-san! 
It's clear that you're enthusiastic about the гАОQueen Elizabeth CupгАП!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That everyone has high expectations for Kawakami-san, and that 
they're excitedвА¶вА¶it seems like I'll be able to write a good article.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you very muchвЩ™ 
By all means, please do raise the excitement.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my utmost! вА¶вА¶especially with the 
current state of Tiara participantsвА¶вА¶people 
are feeling down because of the unfortunate news.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶Yes. Me too, honestlyвА¶вА¶it came as quite the shock.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard quite a bit about it from King-san. 
That to Team <Ascella> she was someone just like the sunвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
AndвАФвАФfor myself too. After all, it was news concerning 
last year's Unorthodox Double Crown. There isn't a 
Tiara Uma Musume around who wouldn't be movedвА¶вА¶!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That someone like that, would nowвА¶вА¶be in that stateвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФHowever, that's exactly why!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The Princess I aim to be, even in that darkness, would never, 
ever give up on finding that light until the very end!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
By shining in my own way, blowing it all away! 
For everyone, I'll be the one to raise their spirits!!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess-sanвА¶вА¶! 
Yes, by all means! I'll be cheering for youвА¶вА¶!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (That's right, I willвА¶вА¶!! I will, without fail!!)

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФWell then, let's begin our Inter-team race! 
Everyone please get in to position. ReadyвА¶вА¶Start!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I have to win, without fail! I willвАФвАФI will!!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Alright, the last straightвА¶вА¶Right hereвАФвАФ!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Nuuuuuuugaaaaaaaa-!!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: !! WaitвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: PuhaaaвА¶вА¶! Haa, haaвА¶вА¶!!

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text: Eh? Ah, um!? First place is Kawakami Princess-sanвА¶вА¶?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶No, wait. Kawakami, the way you moved 
across the course was way too dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If you did that in a real race, you might get penalized 
for obstruction, you know? вА¶вА¶Or rather, lately youвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
M-my apologies!! 
For what I've doneвА¶вА¶I'm sorry, City-san!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Doing something like that is completely unacceptableвА¶вА¶! 
I will work on training again! NuooooooгГЉгГЉгГЉ!!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait!? AaaahвА¶вА¶damnit.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That girl's been working too hard latelyвА¶вА¶I wonder if she's okay. 
I need to think of a better way to follow up on herвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, now, today let's keep on trainingпљЮпљЮпљЮ! 
Today it's muscle training, sweat and strainвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: AhhhпљЮ how troublingпљЮ!! I'm in trouble, so much troubleпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, King-san! You really seem to be troubled 
by somethingвА¶вА¶what ever is the matter!?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
OhпљЮ Kawakami-san, you came with the absolute perfect timing! 
What a coincidence, a wonderful coincidence!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, I need to carry that cardboard box to the training 
grounds. But, right now, just a littleпљЮвА¶вА¶umвА¶вА¶I hurt my hip.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh how horrible!? Something like a measly cardboard box, 
you can leave to me! I can carry it on my pinky!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You will? Then, I suppose I'll leave it to you. 
вА¶вА¶Sorry. Thank you, Kawakami-san.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶Right around here is fine. 
Can I ask you to leave it there, Kawakami-san?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I understand! Nnnsho. 
вА¶вА¶Well then, I'll take myвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶AaaaaaaaaaaaaahhвА¶вА¶!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ! That voice just nowвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Huu, huu, huu, huuвА¶вА¶ 
Taaaaaaaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(вА¶вА¶!? W-what's going on here!? 
Pandora-sanвАФвАФ!!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Not yet! Hold, hold, holdвА¶вА¶!! 
UraaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaгГЉгГЉгГЉгГЉ!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(That flexibilityвА¶вА¶the length of that spurt, that speed!! 
Her running, expression, and her bearingвАФвАФ)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Compared to beforeвА¶вА¶it's completely differentвА¶вА¶!?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kawakami-san.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
ThisвА¶вА¶right, this isn't really advice. 
More like a гАОComplaintгАП. So I'll say it directly to you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶You may think that you're the only one 
shouldering the expectations of victory.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФIn the first place, we weren't going to 
let you carry that on your own, you know?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The kouhais on our team, you shouldn't underestimate them.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶!!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
HaaaaвА¶вА¶! 
Haa, haa, haaвАФвАФвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶I will win. I will definitelyвАФвАФ!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶ How could I?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for my rudeness, King-san. 
I was being just a littleвА¶вА¶no, quite conceited.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to engrave this in to my heart. 
At the next гАОQueen Elizabeth CupгАП, my greatest rivalвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That person's name, is Fusaichi Pandora!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶Fufu, it seems you've understood it properly.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! Fully!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶by the way, King-san. 
Please take good care of your hip.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh? вА¶вА¶Ah, yeahпљЮ! My hip. Ah, that's right, my hip! 
Of course I'll take care!! Yes, of course!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Fufuu! Please do. 
King-san, I hope you always remain energetic.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: AlwaysвАФвАФto me, you're someone important who will always be my guide.
